meanings.AUTHORIZED_LOCAL: runner may execute the move inside the current local jurisdiction profile
meanings.FORBIDDEN: move is outside current regime or violates forbidden input/action rule
meanings.REQUIRES_EXTRACTION: move depends on material that must be lawfully extracted first
meanings.REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW: move is understandable but requires human approval before execution
meanings.REQUIRES_PROPOSAL: runner may describe the move and emit a proposal packet, but may not execute it
